title: decrypt_keyfile returns plain [u8;64]; seed not zeroized on caller stack
description: decrypt_keyfile returns a plain [u8; 64] array. In load_identity, 'let seed = decrypt_keyfile(...)?' binds secret key material to an unzeroized stack variable. After Identity::from_secret_bytes(&seed) returns, seed is dropped without being zeroed, leaving the 64-byte secret seed in memory. The Zeroizing<Vec<u8>> wrapper inside decrypt_keyfile zeroizes the age plaintext buffer, but the copy returned to callers is unprotected. Fix: change return type to Zeroizing<[u8; 64]> or Zeroizing<Vec<u8>>.
